prompt_protocol.agent_visible_source: agent_visible_files.json -> public/agent_visible_spec.md + agent_prompt.md + allowlisted public/support artifacts

evaluation_protocol.primary_track_description: Current v2 task scores use a single agent submission generated from the agent prompt, agent-visible spec, and allowlisted public support artifacts.
evaluation_protocol.feedback_track_description: Feedback-style debug benchmarks may be added later as a separate agentic track with its own runner protocol and score table.
evaluation_protocol.score_mixing_policy: Do not mix one-shot scores and feedback/debug pass@K scores in the same denominator.
evaluation_protocol.bugfix_prompt_policy: For one-shot bugfix tasks, public/agent_visible_spec.md must expose enough coarse behavior envelope to make the repair task solvable without iterative checker feedback while still hiding root cause, gold code, checker source, and private thresholds.
evaluation_protocol.spec_checker_map_policy: Every v2 task form must include private/invisible_spec_checker_map.json linking public requirement anchors, private checker config IDs, and executable checker functions without making private IDs or thresholds agent-visible.

score_policy.score_claim_blocking_reason: Fresh v2 EVAS/Spectre certification has not been rerun for migrated rows.
score_policy.denominator_policy: Only rows with final_v2_score_enabled=true after fresh v2 EVAS/Spectre certification may enter scores.

evas.role: fast behavioral Verilog-A filter and debug evaluator

spectre.role: final simulator reference for release certification and scoring

replaceability.runner_entry_contract: Use --release-root or --config; do not hard-code benchmark-vabench-release-v1.
